name: Crisp
description: Crisp is a customer messaging platform that lets you manage live chat conversations, support inboxes, and customer profiles. Use it to send and receive messages, resolve conversations, and maintain a unified view of your contacts across channels.

capabilities.name: list_conversations
capabilities.description: List and search conversations for a website. Supports filtering by status, assignee, and full-text search across messages.

capabilities.name: send_message
capabilities.description: Send a message in a conversation. Supports text, files, and structured content like picker cards.

capabilities.name: update_conversation_state
capabilities.description: Change the state of a conversation to pending, unresolved, or resolved. Use this to triage and close support tickets.

capabilities.name: get_conversation_messages
capabilities.description: Retrieve the full message history for a specific conversation. Returns all messages exchanged between the visitor and operators.

capabilities.name: create_people_profile
capabilities.description: Create a new contact profile in your Crisp people database. Useful for importing contacts or pre-populating visitor information.

capabilities.name: get_people_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve a contact's profile including their email, name, metadata, and conversation history summary.

capabilities.name: assign_conversation
capabilities.description: Route a conversation to a specific operator or team. Changes who is responsible for handling the conversation.
